series_metadata.series_description: Prepaid Driver Search account records consist of requests for last known address information, cosigner information, and requests for information for driver license applications. These requests are submitted on the Record Request Form (BMV 1173). The boxes also contain requests for verication letters (BMV 2505) to verify license history, copies of driver license applications (BMV 2002), and copies of driving abstracts (BMV 1148T).
